summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected; no close, merge, label, comment, fix, or PR mutation is planned. Security-shaped PRs #91268, #91286, #91288, #91490, and #91584 are routed to central OpenClaw security handling without mutating them; unrelated PRs remain non-mutating classifications. Hydrated preflight covered #91257 through #91473; later refs are non-mutating classifications with target timestamps from the provided job artifact because live hydrated state was not present.
